description_long: This is a modern, rectangular house surrounded by a low fence and landscaped with trees and shrubs along the perimeter. The structure features a flat roof, large windows, and a mix of dark and light exterior wall finishes, giving it a contemporary appearance. The front includes a paved driveway leading to a double garage, while the backyard contains a swimming pool and a patio area with outdoor furniture and umbrellas. The house appears to have a single story with an open layout, visible through the large windows and open roof sections. The property is bordered by a combination of greenery and paved walkways, providing both privacy and accessibility. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, functional outdoor spaces, and a blend of natural and built elements.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a double garage, and a landscaped yard featuring a pool and patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, double garage, paved driveway, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard swimming pool, patio area with umbrellas, and side fencing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the patio, outdoor seating, and the back entrance with large windows and greenery.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool, patio, and the side of the house with additional landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple modern door, paved steps, and a minimal overhang, with direct access from the driveway.
